form.formComment: Resuming from a lengthy break. Only had one start last when she was finished third of 15 runners at Galway on August 2 over 3419m, 3.5 len behind Some Pretender carrying 73.5kg at $10. Not without promise that day but this is a different ball game.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-5). Resuming from a lengthy break. Only had one start last when she was finished third of 15 runners at Galway on August 2 over 3419m, 3.5 len behind Some Pretender carrying 73.5kg at $10. Not without promise that day but this is a different ball game.

form.formComment: Second-up today. Not raced for 48 days. First-up after three months to post a big 19 len win. Warwick on February 20 over 3200m on rain affected going defeating Sparkling Water with 71kg at $2.80. Previously second-up to post a big 11 len win. Dromahane P2p on December 6 over 4828m on rain affected going defeating The Ocean Queen with 57.5kg in a jumps. Can improve on first up performance. Respected so long as she can rein in her exuberance.

form.formComment: Resumes from a spell after having raced just once last campaign finished third of 12 runners at Cheltenham in the LR on November 15 over 3300m, on slow going 5 len behind Celestial Tune with 71kg at $6.50. Won previous preparation first up by 2 len Kildorrery P2p on March 1 2025 over 4828m slow going defeating Lennon Grove carrying 60kg in a jumps. Can pose a serious challenge.

form.formComment: Resumes from a spell after having had just one run last to post a big 15 len win. Huntingdon on January 22 over 3200m on rain affected going defeating Affric Kintail carrying 70.5kg at $15. When resuming last campaign finished third of 12 runners at Worcester on July 1 2024 over 3200m, 2.75 len behind Queen Of The Vale carrying 69kg at $13. This is inevitably harder but hard to rule out.

form.formComment: Having third race start. Won at to post a big 8 len win. Dromahane P2p on April 6 2025 over 4828m defeating Cappa Lass carrying 60kg in a jumps. Returned from break finished second of 8 runners at Newbury on February 28 over 3300m, 5 len behind Princess Day carrying 71kg at $6. Fitter for run. Should do better with that experience behind her.

form.formComment: Chasing a hat-trick. Freshened for 32 days. Last to post a big 4 len win. Naas on March 8 over 3319m defeating Poetisa with 71.5kg at $5.50 in a flat. Run to post a big 3.5 len win. Thurles on February 19 over 3319m defeating Moyneard carrying 71.5kg at $4 in a flat. This will be a tougher test but worthy of respect.

formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(6). Chasing a hat-trick. Freshened for 32 days. Last to post a big 4 len win. Naas on March 8 over 3319m defeating Poetisa with 71.5kg at $5.50 in a flat. form.formComment: Resuming after four months. Finished off last campaign 2 of 14 runners at Huntingdon in the LR December 7 over 3200m, slow track; 1.5 len behind Ti'mamzel with 71kg at $34. When resuming last campaign 2 of 8 starters at this track October 26 over 3410m, behind Edith Pelham with 70.5kg at $6. Experience will count for a lot here.

form.formComment: Raced twice to date. At debut, finished fourth of 14 starters at Limerick on December 26 over 3218m, on rain affected going; 4 len behind Never Late carrying 75kg at $19. To post a big 5 len win. Gowran Park on February 14 over 3419m in the wet defeating Luciole Des Bordes carrying 71.5kg at $6 in a flat. Sure to improve again. Should get competitive.

form.formComment: Third-up today. First-up finished second of 9 runners at Ascot on February 14 over 3100m, 2 len behind Martini Majesty carrying 71kg at $6. Second run from a spell finished fourth of 14 runners at Hereford on March 7 over 3200m, 8 len behind Seven Stars with 71kg at $4. Probably won't pose a huge threat here.

form.formComment: Racing second-up. Won at debut failed to make any headway until the straight; raced back and made ground from the turn; won by 2.5 len Hexham on August 27 over 3200m defeating Opale De Maine with 69.5kg at $10. Went for a spell before returning finished third of 7 runners at Newcastle All Weather on March 3 over 3400m, 9 len behind Lady Walk On Bye carrying 73kg at $5.50. Likely to be found wanting in this line-up.

At only start last preparation sat on speed throughout then finished third of 14 runners at Ludlow on December 3 over 3200m, 2.5 len behind Malina Road carrying 71.5kg at $3.10. Capable of improvement representing a leading stable.

The start before that; finished second in a small field at Windsor on January 18 over 3200m, on slow going 1.0 len behind St James's Finest with 70.5kg at $3.30. Can measure up again.

Previous preparation first-up won by a nose Naas December 15 over 3218m defeating Simply Natural with 69kg at $21. One of the main contenders.
